name: Chili Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour, 1/2 teaspoon dried red pepper (crushed), 2 tablespoons instant minced onion, 1/2 tablespoon instant minced garlic, 1½ teaspoons chili powder, ½ teaspoon sugar, 1 teaspoon seasoned salt, and ½ teaspoon ground cumin until evenly distributed.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold to create an airtight seal. Label the package.
3. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months. This makes approximately ¼ cup of Chili Seasoning Mix. To make additional packages, proportionally increase ingredient amounts.
4. Variation: For a special treat, sprinkle over hot popcorn.
5. To make Chili:
- Brown 1 lb lean ground beef in a medium skillet over medium-high heat and drain.
- Add 2 cans (14 oz each) kidney beans and 1 package of Chili Seasoning Mix.
- Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
- Makes 4 to 6 servings.
